hero.title: Build your family story. Together.
hero.subtitle: Create, manage and share your family tree with full control over your own data.

demo.title: 🌳 View demo
demo.description: No account needed. The demo shows a fictional family tree with 37 people, 2 families and 6 generations.

why.title: Why MyFamTreeCollab?
why.problem: Family data is often scattered across documents, spreadsheets or memories. Collaborating on a family tree is complex and messy.
why.solution: MyFamTreeCollab brings everything together in a simple structure where you stay in control.

privacy.title: 🔐 You stay in control
privacy.text: Export your data as CSV, GEDCOM or JSON. No lock-in.

collab.title: 🤝 Build together
collab.text: Collaborate with family members and build a shared family tree.

easy.title: ⚡ Easy to start
easy.text: No installation needed. Start directly in your browser.

story.title: Why this project?
story.text: This project started with a box of old documents I didn't want to lose. What began in Excel grew into a shared family story.
